title: FontRegistry
description: Open interface for compile-time font-family autocomplete via declaration merging. Register loaded font families in your app's `.d.ts`: ```ts declare module 'exojs' { interface FontRegistry { 'Kenney Future': true; } } ```

sections.title: Import
paragraphs: Open interface for compile-time font-family autocomplete via declaration merging. Register loaded font families in your app's `.d.ts`:
```ts declare module 'exojs' { interface FontRegistry { 'Kenney Future': true; } } ```
